name: Sakshi Thombre
title: Designer
shortBio: I am a directionally challenged person who tends to travel a lot.
buddyUse: Finding Buddies in a new city where i might get lost pretty soon.

name: Ankur Lhila
title: CTO
shortBio: An engineer who trying to do everything right now because there might be no tomorrow.
superpower: Easily think of multiple things which the other person might dislike about me :3.
buddyUse: Curing the "weekend void." I would on Buddy to perfect weekend plans so every Saturday and Sunday feels fully utilised :p.

name: Yash Agarwal
title: Full Stack Dev
shortBio: always up at 4 am for a walks even if its raining.
superpower: sending texts to the wrong person.
buddyUse: "Nudge." It lets me ping people who want to join me making some papercrafts to add to my collection.

name: Roshan Bagla
title: CTO
shortBio: I am a tech enthusiast waiting to be replaced by AI.
buddyUse: To create nudges for pickleball matches and show off a bit in front of new people.

name: Devansh Ladha
title: Full Stack Dev
shortBio: Tech enthusiast who enjoys solving hard problems and building products that make life easy.
buddyUse: Finding people to explore the city with.

name: Pritika Agarwal
title: CEO & Founder
shortBio: People move all the time. I moved once and made it everyone’s problem.
buddyUse: To find a flatmate who loves Harry Potter as much as I do.

name: Aryan Srivastava
title: CPO
shortBio: I panic when someone asks where I'm from because I've moved so many times.
buddyUse: To find a pre-loved home I can call mine
